user.title: Roulez Électrique — Connect (BETA / EXPERIMENTAL)
user.description: **BETA / EXPERIMENTAL** — This integration is under active development and may change. To get your access token, sign in at [roulezelectrique.club](https://roulezelectrique.club), then go to **Profile → Integrations → Home Assistant** and click "Activate".

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Roulez Électrique
reauth_confirm.description: Your API token has been revoked or expired. Generate a new token at **Profile → Integrations → Home Assistant** ({base_url}) and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or revoked API token. Please check the token in your profile.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server. Check the base URL and your internet connection.
error.invalid_scan_interval: The update interval must be between 30 and 900 seconds.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
